/usr/lib64/ccache/bin/g++   -D_LANGUAGE_C_PLUS_PLUS  -fPIC -O0 -g -D_DEBUG   CMakeFiles/mips5kf_si_gen.dir/proc/mips/mips5kf_si.cxx.o  -o mips5kf_si_gen -rdynamic ../../../lib/mips/libsi_gen.a ../../../lib/mips/libisa_gen_topcode.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_properties.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_operands.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_registers.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_subset.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_enums.a ../../../lib/mips/libtarg_isa_lits.a ../../../lib/mips/libgen_util.a
